name: commit-conventions
description: Always-on commit message format for AI coding agents: write every commit in the Conventional Commits format (<type>(scope): description) with an imperative, <=72-char subject, a body that explains why, and issue/work-item references in the footer.

source.title: Conventional Commits Specification
source.relationship: Authored as a portable baseline pack from the Conventional Commits spec; kept generic so it applies to work and personal repositories.
